title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Like it was made by Fitbit!
reviews.text:
I love this strap it is so pretty and such a value for the money. It looks like it cost way more. The little kit it came with to attach it to the Fitbit and to remove extra links was so handy and easy to use. It attached with no trouble at all.

The only issue I had with it was that the rose gold color is slightly off from the Fitbit, but when wearing it, it’s not next to it directly so you can’t really tell. It’s not enough to bother me or take a star off but it could be for some.

reviews.title: Surprised at the comfort and beauty of the band.
reviews.text:
I've only had it on for a few hours, but I love it. The colors, black, pink on the resin look so rich and shiny. And it's a comfortable fit. I did have to take out 2 tabs to get a snug fit. Taking out the tabs wasn't difficult after figuring out the way the tool that came with it. Can't say the instructions were the best, but I figured it out.
I always got the magnetic mesh band in rose gold, but it always discolored and no matter what i tried I couldn't get it cleaned.
This is why I tried a new band. A review prompt gave suggestions of different things to comment on. One of the suggestions was a mobile app. I have no idea what that had to do with the band. Maybe someone knows and can let me know.
UPDATE:
I've been wearing it 24 hours a day, except when showering or recharging the watch. NO discloration, no running of colors (bracelet) and it doesn't get dirty looking like the metalic bands. I'm going to buy another one, just in case something happens to this. So worth the money.

reviews.title: Love this

reviews.title: Love it!!
reviews.text: Love the colors on the band. I like the way the band closes.

reviews.title: Strong Enough For Every Day Use
reviews.text: This is my 2nd band and I love them! I wear them every day and they hold up fantastically! I highly recommend trying them and I will definitely be buying more colors in the future.

reviews.title: Not durable, hard to latch
reviews.text:
I liked the shape of this band and how it looked on my sense. Unfortunately it was less than a week before it started snagging on blankets and towels. Then it started snagging my tighter woven clothes. Within a couple of weeks the area that was snagging on things bent outward resulting in it scratching myself and others along with snagging anything that got close to it.

It is also very hard to do the clasp with one hand. At least if you have a reduced level of manual dexterity. I did figure out how to put it on. Taking it off is easier.

I can't recommend this item. I sent it back for a refund.

reviews.title: Colorful band
reviews.text: I love the color . The band narrows once it comes off the fitbit. My only dislike is the extra band goes under the band instead of on top.

reviews.title: I have a love hate relationship with this band.
reviews.text: I love the look of this band on my Fitbit, it matches perfectly. How you fasten it is kind of a pain. It slips through and runs under itself, which prevents a floppy tail of band, but it can be tricky to do and adjust. Everything else about the band is great. It's lightweight, matches my Fitbit perfectly, and is easy to clean.

reviews.title: Nice Band
reviews.text: I like having options when it comes to the band of my Fitbit Versa3. This one looks nice. It's a little less casual than the silicone ones. It fits my Versa fine and was easy to attach. I wear my Fitbit on my left arm (I'm right handed). I found it a little more difficult to put on my wrist than my other bands. I was able to get it, but it took a few tries. Once on my wrist, my Versa feels secure and I'm not concerned about it coming undone.

reviews.title: Super Cute

reviews.title: Glitchy smartwatch has a mind of its own
reviews.text:
I've been using this smartwatch for about five weeks. There are tons of watch faces to choose from, but I couldn't find any with just the info I wanted at a glance: time, date, steps, and weather. I found one watch face with everything but weather and loaded that, but the watch face spontaneously changes several times a day to designs I've never selected. I don't like having to reset it with my phone every few hours to get back to my preferred watch face.

It vibrates at random times and shows me (what I believe is) some sort of prompt to reset it. Sometimes it prompts me for voice commands or makes phone calls for no apparent reason. I erased my contacts, so I hope it won't accidentally wrist-dial anyone else.

It needs to be recharged every 2-3 days — not every ten days as claimed for "Bluetooth daily usage mode" — and I'm NOT using the majority of its supposed features.

I've reached out to customer support a few times, but they say I'm doing something wrong. I'm just wearing it; the glitches happen whether I'm moving or still. Support has been no help at all. I haven't been able to find information on how to make it work as advertised online either, but at least Google doesn't blame me for the faulty product.

reviews.title: Un-binds Constantly...
reviews.text: It wont update, most of the watch faces don't download correctly. It decides on it's own when to un-bind from blu tooth. The only reason i'm not returning is because it's comfortable and it tracks my steps and tells time. Literally the only things I use. However, you do not receive messages, you miss calls, and it struggles to bind to your phone. I have had to re-install the app numerous times. When i complained to the online chat. they suggested re-installing the app. That was their only answer to any questions. Doesn't seem like anyone knows really what's going on. either way, if you want to "phone/messages" part of the watch, i highly suggest shopping for a different one.

reviews.title: Face size is great for reading it without glasses
reviews.text: I like being able to see the face and read it without my glasses. I didn't turn on any of the special features like phone, pictures, messaging, etc; mainly because it's made in China, but I'm sure I'm giving away info anyway. Unlike the Fitbit, this doesn't have a way to list and track your food intake and glucose readings. I bought it inorder to read the time, steps, etc, without glasses.

reviews.title: 2G is Dead
reviews.text: This watch says that it utilizes a sim card with 2g service. This service is nearly dead everywhere. The sim card area in the watch is a little tricky to figure out. You have to open the back and then lift up the battery slightly. The sim card slot is located under the battery. You have to slide(left/right) and lift up the metal sim card cover like a door. Insert the sim card and lay the metal cover down over it and slide it into place to lock it. This watch is not waterproof. The watch works as specified except for the 2g calling. 2g service is not available in my area, so make sure you check if your area still has it. You have to buy your own sim card and they recommend Speedtalk service. Check their coverage map for 2g service.

reviews.title: This is just a 22mm silicone watch strap, ignore the smartwatch stuff if you're using a real watch.
reviews.text:
Recently Amazon had a sale on a watch I like, a Seiko Solar 42mm faced 22mm lug analog watch. A real watch, that tells time, day, date and that's all, what we in the watch enthusiast world like to call a "tool watch". Because it's a tool for telling time. Period. I"m a semi-retired IT engineer and have more than enough screens in my life, I don't need nor want one in place of a real watch too. This watch runs for 10 months on a full charge from a light source and never needs a battery replacement, eat your heart out 3 day smartwatches.

I decided being as the watch is black with a sort of stencil font on the face indices that I'd take a chance on this band and accessorize it with a military-looking Army Green silicone band -- Because I do not wear permeable (leather, nylon, canvas, cloth, etc.) watch straps I decided an Army Green silicone band was the way to go with the new watch and put the canvas band that came on it in a drawer. I don't wear NATO straps either, first because they're permeable nylon (permeable is a no-no for me) and secondly because to me they look like someone tried to tie their watch on their wrist with a chunk of old seat belt.

This band fits on a 22mm lug's spring-bar perfectly. It's very easy and fast to remove or replace too. I've tried to get it to let go of the spring-bar "by accident" and it's on there very solidly, at least as solid as any other system. I have a rather large 8" wrist and there's room to spare on the band. It's also very quick and easy to remove or replace, I wish more bands would use this kind of system. I wish more bands came in this length too, it's hard fro me to find one that fits without strangling my hand.

The "keepers", the little loops that hold the tongue of the strap in place where it emerges from the buckle, have lugs on them that fit in the sizing slots on the band. That's a GREAT extra feature because those keepers tend to wander up and down the watchband without those lugs to hold them in place. This can cause either the tongue of the band or the keeper to snag on something which can break the band or the keeper loop. No problem with this band, the lugs on the keepers stabilize them exactly where you put them. This is something that is not shown nor addressed in the product description and very much should be. It's a deciding factor for me and I might have returned the watchstrap if it didn't have those lugs on the keepers.

The band is about the thickness you'd expect and has no discernible taper from lug to buckle. Being silicone it weighs very little and does not appreciably add to the weight of the watch and strap combo. It's just a good, plain, non-reactive, non-absorbent, military looking watchstrap. That will fit on any watch, smart or otherwise, with a 22mm lug. I don't know if I'd use this strap on an Omega or a Rolex, mostly because those are much heavier watches than the one I use the strap on. It's a little plain for a multi-thousand dollar plus watch too, I think there are better choices. But for a watch I got at less than half price and intend to wear every day to save my nicer watches the wear, tear and scratches that come with that kind of use ... This band works perfectly.

The only complaint I have with it is that I could do without the little "smart watch" triangles, of which there are three. One on the buckle and one near each lug attachment. But that's a very, very minor issue and not worth taking a star off my review over. I knew they were there when I ordered it and this is a style thing not a failure in design and materials thing. This particular watch that I'm using this band on has a very similar little triangle on the bezel above the 12 o'clock indices so it looks like the strap was made for the watch ... sort of. Actually now that I look at it some more, it looks quite natural.

We'll see how long it lasts, I just got it. If it has an unreasonably short service life I'll come back here and add an edit to this review. If you don't see that addition, what I say here stands current.

title: OCTANDRA Active VeryFitPro Fitness Tracker HR Heart Rate Sleep Monitor Step Counter IP67 Waterproof Activity Tracker Smart Band Pedometer Running Smart Watch for Men & Women (ID115Plus HR) (Black)
features: [Turn Your Good Intentions into Lifelong Habits] Get motivated and step up your daily activity goals with Octandra Active Fitness Watch for Men and Women! Apart from its main task of monitoring your health and fitness, it works as your personal digital assistant!

[Stay Active with Very Fit Pro] Download VeryFitPro from Google Play or App Store, pair the sports watch and start using its advanced health monitoring tools - Compatible with both Android 4.4, iOS 8.0 or above!

[All Day Fitness Tracker Watch] - Works as a heart rate monitor, step tracker and calorie counter. Also it monitors distance, pace and active minutes to give you a clear picture of your health and fitness!

[Advanced Sleep Tracker] Octandra Health Watch monitors the quantity and quality of your sleep and give clearer picture of how much quality sleep you’re getting! (Monitors deep sleep, light sleep, and awake time)
[Multi Sports Modes] With 14 sports modes, Octandra Smart Watches for Men and Women help you better understand each sport. (You can select 3 activity modes at a time via the app)

[Thoughtfully Crafted Design] Octandra Smart Bracelet features 0.96-inch Black and White OLED screen, IP67 waterproof design (Not suitable to wear while swimming or bathing. Can be worn while jogging in the rain or doing the dishes) and soft TPE straps which suit wrist sizes from 5.4 to 7.6 inches!

[Convenient USB Charging with Long-Lasting Battery] Enjoy 5-7 days of battery life with 1-2 hours charging time via built-in USB! (During actual use, battery life is related to various factors such as settings, operations, and operating conditions, and therefore may differ from the test conditions)
[A Sweet Life Companion] Never miss your calls, texts, and social app notifications with Octandra Active Exercise Watch!
[More Practical Tools] You can use our running watch as a stop watch, sedentary reminder, alarm watch, and camera shutter remote control of your smartphone!

[Important] This fitness band is not a medical device. All the measurement data and results are provided for reference only and cannot be compared with the results of professional medical devices, used to perform professional diagnosis or monitoring of any medical conditions. Due to external factors (such as arm hair, tattoos, or darker skin), there may be cases where measurement results are inaccurate or even unavailable!

reviews.title: Not a good buy
reviews.text: The 1st one I got "went crazy" and started just cycling thru the various screens on the watch.  I returned it and got a replacement because we all know that "stuff happens".  I got the replacement and it seemed to be working well until day 28, when it stopped connecting with the app at all, even though I installed and uninstalled it several times as the troubleshooting recommended.  Then it started draining my battery dry and that meant it needed to be returned.  Don't waste your money on this one unless you have LOTS of time to fiddle with it!

reviews.title: I wanted to like this product...
reviews.text:
I wanted a simple activity tracker and this looked like it was perfect. There are a number of things that worked well, battery life, simplicity, matched my needs... However, the accuracy is non existent. I was at the gym working out vigorously and my heart rate was 50 and dropping. I checked it with another app on my phone and I was approaching 140. When I am at rest it creeps into the 90's. by the way, I have entered all profile info. The steps are also way off as I tested against an app on my phone.

I tried but its not worth the effort.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Best band I’ve ever worn! These are so comfortable and lightweight that I sometimes forgot I have my Fitbit on! It’s breathable! I like that it was so many holes that you can use to tighten with. Sometimes with others their so far apart that it’s righter too loose or too tight. Trust me, you will not have that issue with this band! The design is so beautiful and the colors are perfect!

reviews.title: Great bands
reviews.text: Comfortable and lots of holes to change size. Looks pretty and I like the thinner band.

reviews.title: Easier to set-up than previous bands
reviews.text:
I have really struggled getting replacement bands in place in the past. I had this one switched over in a matter of minutes. The lacy look makes it less apparent that the band is vinyl and the dark colors help to hide stains. I have bad metal allergies nd was a bit afraid of what would happen with the clasp given it is metal and has some contact with my skin. Been wearing this since December and the only time I have issues with a rash was when I had the watch fastened too tightly to my wrist. I believe this was from trapped sweat and moisture and not a metal allergy reaction.
Extra great deal in that you get three bands. I don't foresee a need to buy more bands for at least a year.

I really like the pink bandThe material is cool and comfortable. It is easy to change the bands for a different look.
I would definitely buy again.
